title: Senior Manager, Marketing Operations
description_text: Own campaign operations, lifecycle automation, funnel reporting, and marketing systems planning.

title: Customer Lifecycle Marketing Manager
description_text: Lead lifecycle campaigns, customer journey reporting, CRM segmentation, and cross-functional retention programs.

title: Customer Success Manager
description_text: Own customer relationships, drive adoption, coordinate renewals, and partner with cross-functional internal teams.

title: Product Manager
description_text: Own product roadmap, customer discovery, release planning, and feature prioritization for a SaaS platform.

title: Software Engineer
description_text: Build backend systems, write code, and debug production services.
